cloudfront.realtimelogconfig.endpoint.Cf: Contains information about the Amazon Kinesis data stream where you are sending real-time log data in a real-time log configuration.

cloudfront.realtimelogconfig.endpoint.Ki.Description: Contains information about the Amazon Kinesis data stream where you are sending real-time log data.

cloudfront.realtimelogconfig.endpoint.St.Description: The type of data stream where you are sending real-time log data. The only valid value is `Kinesis`.
